zh.St. Michael's Church, Workington, Cumber: 英國波藍德沃爾金頓聖 米可艾爾也斯 邱奇
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Christopher Curwen I於1382年之前出生在英國波藍德沃爾金頓時，他的父親Sir William Curwen Knt.32歲，母親Ellen Brun31歲。他於大約1407年與Elizabeth Hudleston在英國波藍德米洛姆結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他於1415年登記服兵役。他於1415年被列為sheriff of cumberland。他去世於1453年7月17日在他的家鄉，埋葬在英國波藍德沃爾金頓聖 米可艾爾也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.St. Michael's Church, Workington, Cumber: 英国波藍德沃爾金頓聖 米可艾爾也斯 邱奇
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Christopher Curwen I于1382年之前出生在英国波藍德沃爾金頓时，他的父亲Sir William Curwen Knt.32岁，母亲Ellen Brun31岁。他于大约1407年与Elizabeth Hudleston在英国波藍德米洛姆结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他于1415年登记服兵役。他于1415年被列为sheriff of cumberland。他去世于1453年7月17日在他的家乡，埋葬在英国波藍德沃爾金頓聖 米可艾爾也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Curwen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English (Lancashire): habitational name from a place called Culewen (now Colvend) in Kirkcudbrightshire. The family was early established in Lancashire, where it was often pronounced without the -w-; see Corrin and Currin .

variants.name: Corrin
meanings: Irish and Manx: shortened form of Mac Torin, from Gaelic mac ‘son (of)’ + Old Norse Thórfinnr (from Thórr, the name of the Scandinavian thunder god, + the ethnic designation Finnr). Compare Turpin . This name has occasionally been confused with Corin .

nameMeanings.name: Christopher
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Greek name Khristophoros, from Khristos ‘Christ’ + pherein ‘to bear’. This was popular among early Christians, conscious of the fact that they were metaphorically bearing Christ in their hearts. A later, over-literal interpretation of the name gave rise to the legend of a saint who actually bore the Christ-child over a stream; he is regarded as the patron of travellers. In England the name was uncommon in the Middle Ages, but became very popular in the 16th century, especially in parts of the North.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Christopher Curwen I was born before 1382, in Workington, Cumberland, England, his father, Sir William Curwen Knt., was 32 and his mother, Ellen Brun, was 31. He married Elizabeth Hudleston about 1407, in Millom, Cumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He registered for military service in 1415. In 1415, his occupation is listed as sheriff of cumberland. He died on 17 July 1453, in his hometown, and was buried in St Michael's Church, Workington, Cumberland, England.

fr.St. Michael's Church, Workington, Cumber: St Michael's Church, Workington, Cumberland, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Christopher Curwen I est né avant 1382, à Workington, Cumberland, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Curwen Knt., avait 32 ans et sa mère, Ellen Brun, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Hudleston environ 1407, à Millom, Cumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1415. En 1415, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of cumberland. Il est décédé le 17 juillet 1453, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à St Michael's Church, Workington, Cumberland, Angleterre.

de.St. Michael's Church, Workington, Cumber: St Michael's Church, Workington, Cumberland, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Christopher Curwen I vor 1382 in Workington, Cumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Curwen Knt. 32 und seine Mutter Ellen Brun 31. Er hat um 1407 in Millom, Cumberland, England Elizabeth Hudleston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er hat sich 1415 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1415 ist sein Beruf als sheriff of cumberland aufgeführt. Er starb am 17. Juli 1453 in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in St Michael's Church, Workington, Cumberland, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Christopher Curwen I è nato il prima del 1382 nel Workington, Cumberland, England, il suo padre, Sir William Curwen Knt., aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Ellen Brun, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Hudleston circa 1407, nel Millom, Cumberland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1415. Nel 1415, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of cumberland. Morì il 17 luglio 1453, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a St Michael's Church, Workington, Cumberland, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Christopher Curwen Iが1382年以前にイギリスクウンバーランドウオルキントンで生まれた時，父Sir William Curwen Knt.は32歳，母Ellen Brunは31歳であった。約1407年にイギリスクウンバーランドミロムでElizabeth Hudlestonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1415年に兵役登録をした。1415年，職業はsheriff of cumberlandと記録されている。彼は1453年7月17日に故郷で死去し，イギリスクウンバーランドウオルキントンスト ミチャエル'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.St. Michael's Church, Workington, Cumber: 영국 c벌랜드 워킨그턴 스트 믹하얼'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Christopher Curwen I(이)가 1382년 이전 영국 c벌랜드 워킨그턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Curwen Knt.(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Ellen Brun(은)는 31세였다. 그는 대략 1407년 영국 c벌랜드 미롬에서 Elizabeth Hudleston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1415년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1415년, 그의 직업은 sheriff of cumberland이었다. 그는 1453년 7월 17일 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 c벌랜드 워킨그턴 스트 믹하얼'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.St. Michael's Church, Workington, Cumber: St Michael's Church, Workington, Cumberland, Inglaterra
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Christopher Curwen I nasceu antes 1382, em Workington, Cumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Curwen Knt., tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Ellen Brun, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Hudleston aproximadamente 1407, em Millom, Cumberland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1415. Em 1415, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of cumberland. Ele faleceu em 17 de julho de 1453, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em St Michael's Church, Workington, Cumberland, Inglaterra.

ru.St. Michael's Church, Workington, Cumber: ст мачаел'с чурч, воркингтон, кумбирланд, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Christopher Curwen I родился перед 1382 г. в местности воркингтон, кумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Curwen Knt. было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Ellen Brun, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Hudleston около 1407 г. в местности миллом, кумбирланд, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. В 1415 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1415 годуработал по профессии sheriff of cumberland. Он умер 17 июля 1453 г. в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности ст мачаел'с чурч, воркингтон, кумбирланд, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Christopher Curwen I nació antes de 1382, en Workington, Cumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Curwen Knt., tenía 32 años y su mamá, Ellen Brun, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Hudleston aproximadamente 1407, en Millom, Cumberland, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1415. En 1415, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of cumberland. Murió el 17 de julio de 1453, en su pueblo, y fue sepultado en St Michael's Church, Workington, Cumberland, Inglaterra.
